ab: ngyatuma ku vai kaiasaa?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: makecelre palalrange, pangiadrava ungulu ku maculu ka acilai.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: ngyatuma ku vai kaiasaa?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: wadrangedrange palalrange, pangyadrau madu ungulu ku acilai.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: ngyatuma ku vai latadre?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: ngyacaeme kai vai, ngulringava kibalai ki vai.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: ngyatuma ku vai latadre?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: makalra ku emeeme, kadruwa ku vai subelebelenge.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: aingituma ku vai ludhaa?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: ludhaa aikadruwa ku vai, lai kakalra ku emeeme, si kasasevehe.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: lu ataavaevahaneta idra vayvai aingituma ku vai?
en: How’s the weather on the day we go out?

ab: lu ataavaevahaneta idra vayvai aikakecelre, syaebelemadu lu mulatadra.
ch: B:那天會有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It will be a bit cold and you need to wear a jacket when you go outside.

ab: aingituma ku vai lu taibalribalriva?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: aikathahihi ku vai lu taibalribalriva.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: lu ataavaevahaneta idra vayvai aiudale?
en: Will it be rainy on the day we go out?

ab: lu ataavaevahaneta idra vayvai aivai, kadruwa ka aiudale.
ch: B:出遊那天天氣會晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: lu ataavaevahaneta idra vayvai aiudale?
en: Will it be rainy on the day we go out?

ab: eene, aiudale lu ataavaevahaneta ka vai.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: waudawdale kaiasasaa?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: maugawnga, ngyabualenga ku vai.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: waudawdale kaiasasaa?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: waudawdalenga, kadruwa ka wailuku ku lenai.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: waudale latadre?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: kadruwa ku udale kaiasasaa, aiudale lu makamulringedele, wailukumadu ku lenai.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: luicaili ki kalakecelra aikakecelre?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: eene, luicaili ki kalakecelra aikakecelre, syalakakalramadu ku kahingalai.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: aidrangedrange kai caili kaiasaa?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: eene, aidrangedrange lu kaladrangedranga, pangiadrau madu ungulu ku acilai.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: madalame su ki kalahyahiga?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: madalama ku ki kalahyahiga. maculu ku vai.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: madalame su ki kalamuhuhuwa ki biya?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: malrasaku ki kalamuhuhuwa ki biya. makalra ku sedreke.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
